---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AgentForge
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or behavior you'd like to see.

## Use Case

Explain how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it.

## Example Usage

```bash
# Show how the feature would work
agentforge <command> <args>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature request.
